personal.name: Manoj Manoharan
personal.title: Senior Graphic Designer
personal.tagline: Senior Graphic Designer with extensive experience in Brand Identity, Digital Design, and Motion Graphics.
personal.about: Merging storytelling and interactive experiences to elevate global campaigns. Most recently at Mindtickle, driving significant improvement in asset engagement and cutting turnaround time through rigorous brand consistency and motion design.

work.title: Mindtickle Motion Brand Bumper
work.description: Premium corporate video bumper engineered to establish consistent motion design and sleek brand storytelling at corporate conferences.

work.title: Colliers Growth & Storytelling Layouts
work.description: Custom vector layouts and editorial page designs displaying regional real estate insights and market developments.

work.title: Customer-Focused Promo Motion Sequence
work.description: Interactive promotional motion asset designed for digital advertising platforms to highlight customer success narratives.

work.title: EY Digital Advisory Brand Campaigns
work.description: High-fidelity static and motion graphics crafted to promote technology consultation services across European banking sectors.

work.title: KPMG Corporate Pitch Systems
work.description: Monochrome visual templates and custom corporate slide designs designed to streamline international client advisory bids.

work.title: Creative Brand Identity & Visual Assets
work.description: Comprehensive design guidelines and bespoke typography systems mapping custom visual identities for SaaS startups.

roadmap.description: Designed and produced high-impact marketing assets across web, social, email, video, and print. Partnered with cross-functional growth teams to translate complex business goals into visually compelling campaign concepts.
achievements: Strengthened brand storytelling and campaign performance
Led responsive UI design projects in Figma, creating interactive prototypes
Drove asset engagement rates based on A/B testing and analytics
Maintained global visual consistency using scalable design systems

roadmap.description: Directed end-to-end creative production for the APAC region. Managed microsite design and interactive storytelling projects using Figma, Ceros, and Infogram to enhance user experiences.
achievements: Oversaw video production and motion graphics from concept to post-production
Led a cross-border creative team of designers across India, Singapore, and Australia

roadmap.description: Designed and delivered corporate marketing collateral, digital assets, and motion graphics tailored for EMEA banking and insurance clients.
achievements: Collaborated daily with global design teams in the UK and Europe
Pioneered use of motion graphics in corporate storytelling, increasing client engagement
Built advanced After Effects, Illustrator, and Photoshop workflows for polished visuals

roadmap.description: Supported U.S. based clients with creative direction, storytelling, and visual production for client proposals and digital marketing campaigns.
achievements: Designed presentation decks and branded materials that helped improve win rates in client proposals
Streamlined creative workflows and introduced new design templates
Maintained high precision across brand proposals

roadmap.description: Created visually persuasive PowerPoint presentations for global consulting teams, simplifying complex business ideas through clean layouts and custom graphics.
achievements: Collaborated across time zones with international teams for on-time delivery
Contributed to a library of high-quality design assets that improved project delivery efficiency
Standardized charts and visual systems for executive-level presentations
